alerts.title: Trump threatens 'annihilation' as Iran-US strike cycle intensifies on Day 121
alerts.summary: US-Iran tit-for-tat strikes escalated sharply on June 28, with Iran attacking eight US military targets (Ali Al-Salem Airbase Kuwait, 5th Fleet HQ Bahrain) and US retaliating against Iranian coastal missile/drone sites near Strait of Hormuz. CNBC reports Trump threatened annihilation; talks described as on hold. Multiple outlets (AP, NBC, Reuters, Al Jazeera, NPR) confirm ceasefire fragility.
alerts.region: Persian Gulf, Kuwait, Bahrain, Strait of Hormuz

alerts.title: Iran nuclear breakout window compressed to 1-2 weeks amid active hostilities
alerts.summary: IAEA confirms Iran maintains 60% U-235 enrichment with breakout timeline of ~1-2 weeks. UN nuclear chief indicates inspectors will visit sites only after final deal completion. Concurrent military escalation (strike cycle continuing on Day 121) narrows diplomatic window further as threat level stands at CRITICAL (9/10).

alerts.title: UN halts Strait of Hormuz shipping evacuation after vessel attack
alerts.summary: UN agency suspended evacuation operations through Strait of Hormuz following attack on commercial shipping, per AP News. CENTCOM confirmed US strikes on Iranian naval targets in response. Clustering of maritime incidents around Hormuz (26.7–26.41°N, 56.3–56.51°E) reflects pattern of targeting critical chokepoint.

alerts.title: Israel strikes Beirut as Hezbollah rejects US-brokered Lebanon security deal
alerts.summary: Hezbollah formally rejected US-backed Israel-Lebanon security framework as 'surrender,' per Reuters and Jerusalem Post. Israel responded with Beirut strikes and destroyed major Hezbollah tunnel in South Lebanon. Netanyahu stated Israel retains freedom to strike Hezbollah. Framework collapse signals imminent escalation on Israel-Lebanon border.

alerts.title: Cyber group claims California water system hack in retaliation for Iran strikes
alerts.summary: Iranian-attributed cyber group claimed responsibility for California water system compromise in retaliation for US airstrikes against Iran, per Middle East Eye. Incident reflects escalating cyber dimension of US-Iran conflict alongside kinetic operations. Nuclear/cyber nexus underscores multi-domain escalation risk.

analysis_note: US-Iran military escalation on Day 121 has broken ceasefire framework with coordinated strike cycles, nuclear breakout now compressed to 1-2 weeks, and proxy/cyber dimensions activating in parallel; diplomatic resolution window critically narrowed.
